steps.title: Find annual savings
steps.content:
The yearly savings are the old yearly cost minus the new yearly cost:
$$4{,}820-3{,}140$$

steps.title: Compare savings to cost
steps.content: After $t$ years, total savings are $$(4{,}820-3{,}140)t$$ The savings must exceed the $28{,}000$ dollar installation cost, so $$28{,}000<(4{,}820-3{,}140)t$$ The answer is B.
